items.briefing:
Scammers are increasingly targeting athletes and public figures using sophisticated impersonation tactics — but everyday Australians are also at risk from similar methods. Separately, a malware campaign called KongTuke is tricking people through fake Microsoft Teams messages, potentially giving attackers access to organisational systems. Australia is also actively partnering internationally to combat scams, reflecting the growing scale of the threat locally.

Be cautious of unexpected Microsoft Teams messages containing links — even if they appear to come from a colleague, verify through a separate channel before clicking anything.
